summary: Frontend testing of TruckersNav P0/P1 features: traffic sign decluttering + Lowe's/Home Depot POI changes. All 8 UI test items PASS. Code review confirmed all targeted changes are correctly implemented.
critical_code_review_comments: All targeted changes verified in code review and UI testing - no issues found.
NavigationView.tsx line 3361: milesRemaining <= 0 guard correctly prevents traffic signs from rendering when not actively navigating (P0 fix).
NavigationView.tsx line 3069: Traffic infrastructure fetch also respects milesRemaining <= 0 guard, preventing unnecessary Overpass API calls when idle.
NavigationView.tsx line 3086: milesRemaining > 0 ? 1 : 0 as useEffect dependency correctly triggers re-evaluation when navigation starts/stops.
geminiService.ts lines 450-453: Overpass query for Lowe's/Home Depot correctly uses hgv!='no' filter to exclude truck-restricted locations.
geminiService.ts line 290: HERE API search correctly includes 'Lowe's Pro' and 'Home Depot Pro' search terms.
geminiService.ts lines 374-376 (HERE) and 537-540 (Overpass): Both code paths now return 'Large Lot Parking' amenity for Lowe's and Home Depot.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. Vite+Express single-stack on port 8001. USE_MOCK_DATA=true in FirebaseProvider.tsx so no auth needed. Filter panel: click funnel/filter button (title='Filter POIs') on right map controls. Traffic Signs toggle is at top of filter panel. Lowe's/Home Depot visible after scrolling filter panel. Load Board accessible via sidebar. All traffic sign decluttering code confirmed correct in NavigationView.tsx lines 3357-3442. POI changes confirmed in geminiService.ts. MOCKED: Load Board freight data is mathematically generated, not from real DAT/Truckstop API.

test_results.app_loads_dashboard: PASS - Dashboard shows Command Center with metrics
test_results.map_renders_2d_leaflet: PASS - Leaflet map container found, satellite and standard tile layers working
test_results.traffic_sign_toggle_visible: PASS - 'Traffic Signs & Lights' toggle at top of Filter POIs panel with checkmark
test_results.poi_filter_panel_opens: PASS - Filter panel opens with brand icons (Love's, Pilot, Flying J, Petro, TA, etc.)
test_results.filter_panel_lowes_home_depot: PASS - Both LOWE'S and HOME DEPOT visible in filter panel with checkmarks
test_results.load_board_loads_and_editable_fields: PASS - 7 loads shown, RPM Target $3.00/mi and MAX WEIGHT 42000 lbs editable fields confirmed
test_results.3d_2d_toggle: PASS - '2D' button visible on right map controls (title='Switch to 3D')
test_results.code_review_milesRemaining_dep: PASS - milesRemaining>0?1:0 in useEffect deps at line 3086
test_results.code_review_lowes_large_lot: PASS - 'Large Lot Parking' in geminiService.ts lines 374 and 538
test_results.code_review_homedepot_large_lot: PASS - 'Large Lot Parking' in geminiService.ts lines 376 and 540
test_results.code_review_overpass_hgv_filter: PASS - hgv!='no' filter in Overpass query lines 450-453
test_results.code_review_here_pro_search: PASS - 'Lowe's Pro' and 'Home Depot Pro' in HERE API search line 290
